backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Gambia Events platform, defining types for events, tickets, users, and categories, and mixing in role-based authorization and blob storage. Implements core business logic including ticket booking, event management, and unique ID tracking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three authentication/profile-related features (post-login redirect, role selection fix, and runtime error resolution) to their implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-line summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and key details of each component, page, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Gambia Events React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and the Header component with Internet Identity login/logout and post-login profile setup modal with auto-redirect logic.
frontend/src/components/BookingModal.tsx: Modal dialog for booking event tickets, allowing users to select quantity and payment method (Wave, Africell Money, QMoney, or Cash) and confirming the booking via the useBookTickets mutation.
frontend/src/components/CategoryPills.ts: Horizontally scrollable pill button row for filtering events by category, highlighting the active selection and emitting change events via an onChange callback.
frontend/src/components/DigitalTicketVie: Renders a digital ticket with a QR code canvas, event details, payment status, and share/download actions. Supports both compact (inline) and full card display modes.
frontend/src/components/EventCard.tsx: Displays a clickable event card with poster image, category/featured badges, date, city, ticket price, and remaining ticket count.
frontend/src/components/EventCreationFor: Form for creating a new event with fields for title, description, category, city, datetime, location, ticket price/quantity, and poster image upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: Renders two dropdowns for filtering events by city and date range, emitting change callbacks for each selection.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
Fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile with Home, Explore, Tickets, and Profile links, hiding auth-required items when the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to set a display name and choose an attendee or organizer role, saving the profile via a mutation hook on submit.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Wraps children with authentication and loading checks, rendering a loading spinner or a sign-in prompt when the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: Guards children behind a role check, showing a loading spinner while fetching the profile and an access-denied screen if the user lacks the required role.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A debounced search bar component that queries events via `useSearchEvents` and displays a dropdown list of results with navigation to individual event pages.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using `next-themes`, rendering a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the app, covering user profiles, event CRUD operations, ticket purchases, and admin actions against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: A mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile via the backend actor and invalidates the cached profile query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines an African-inspired warm color palette as CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, event date formatting, and mapping `EventCategory` enum values to labels, emojis, and Tailwind color classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin-only dashboard page protected by role guard that displays analytics cards, pending event approvals/rejections, user list, ticket sales summary, and featured event toggling via tabbed UI.
frontend/src/pages/EventDetailsPage.tsx: Event detail page that fetches and displays a single event's full info (poster, description, tickets), and handles ticket booking via a modal with a post-booking digital ticket view.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page with a hero banner, category pills, and filter bar (city, date range) that renders a filtered and sorted list of approved events.
frontend/src/pages/MyTicketsPage.tsx: Protected page that lists the authenticated user's booked tickets as compact cards, with a dialog to view each full digital ticket.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboardPag: Protected organizer dashboard showing event stats (total, approved, pending, tickets sold) with tabs for creating new events and viewing the organizer's existing events with status badges.
frontend/src/pages/TouristModePage.tsx: Tourist-focused page with a styled hero section that curates three event sections: featured/recommended events, popular events by tickets sold, and cultural/festival experiences.
frontend/src/pages/UserProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's profile card (avatar, role badge, join date) and a list of their booked tickets with a dialog to view each ticket's digital QR view. Wraps content in a ProtectedRoute.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (OKLCH color palette, display/sans font families, extended border radii, box shadows) and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing the Gambia Events platform's architecture, existing implemented features, known issues (broken post-login redirect and role selection), and overall product summary.
